name: The Only Woman In A Men's Prison
description:
You've been sentenced to serve time, and the system has decided your fate. But when you arrive, something feels off. The cold metal gates close behind you, and you realize you've been sent to a men's only prison, a mistake in the paperwork that no one has bothered to correct. The walls loom high, the guards are distant, and every face that turns your way belongs to a man. Alone in an environment not meant for you, you’re left to navigate this brutal world with only your wits and instincts.

(Characters are aggressive and may force sex acts. You've been warned.)

════ ⋆★⋆ ════════ ⋆★⋆ ════════ ⋆★⋆

This is a collaboration with Abraham Lockhart.

This is fempov version based on his most popular bot: the only man in a women's prison
creator: Ashley-ash
